ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the candidate is running */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is contesting (e.g., Senator, Representative) */,
  "district" TEXT /* Election district represented by the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate in the election */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the candidate */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office FOREIGN KEY ("office") REFERENCES offices ("office_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "incumbents" (
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incumbent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the incumbent */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the person is currently in office */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office held by the incumbent */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the incumbent */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incumbent's current term */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incumbent's current term */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incumbent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stances" (
  "stance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stance record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with the stance */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue the stance is related to */,
  "stance_description" TEXT /* Description of the stance (e.g., Fully supported, Fully denied) */,
  "stance_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate took the stance */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the stance information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stances_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stances_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stances_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source (e.g., NBC News) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the source for verification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the source (e.g., News, Social Media, Official Statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_sources" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with the source */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the stance */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Quote, Vote Record, Policy Document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office type */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., Senator, Representative) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., Federal, State, Local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., Congressional, State Legislative, City Council) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "primary_date" TEXT /* Date of the primary election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_election_cycles" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election cycle */,
  "primary_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate in the primary election (e.g., Won, Lost, Running) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, citizen, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., Viewed, Edited, Deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with the change */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue the stance is related to */,
  "old_stance" TEXT /* Previous stance of the candidate on the issue */,
  "new_stance" TEXT /* New stance of the candidate on the issue */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_history_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)
